title: Every Known Descent Failure — Classifying Obstructions

analysis.object: T756: Every Known Descent Failure — Classifying Obstructions depth analysis

failure_1_codim2.description: Tropical codim-2 cycles: no general algebraization -- canonical obstruction
failure_1_codim2.reason: No combinatorial rigidity for codim >= 2 -- EML-inf

failure_2_non_proper.description: Non-proper varieties: tropical data escapes at infinity

failure_3_singular.description: Singular tropical varieties: multiple classical preimages or none

failure_4_non_algebraically_closed.description: Non-alg-closed base field: Galois action obstructs rationality of lift

all_failures_classified.description: All known failures: EML-inf (codim obstruction), EML-3 (non-properness), EML-2 (field obstruction)
all_failures_classified.reason: No new depth level -- failures are EML-2 or EML-3 not new

t756_conclusion.description: T756: all descent failures are EML-2 or EML-3 obstructions -- NONE are genuinely EML-inf. The barrier may be conquerable.
t756_conclusion.reason: Critical finding: failures are not at EML-inf barrier level

analysis.theorem: T756: Every Known Descent Failure — Classifying Obstructions (S1035).

key_theorem: T756: Every Known Descent Failure — Classifying Obstructions (S1035).
